step_rationale: Systemic CAD risk modifier; endocrine/metabolic axis; not direct cascade step.
mechanism: SHBG is a systemic CAD-risk modifier that regulates sex-hormone bioavailability and influences metabolic and vascular health independent of atherothrombotic cascade steps.

references.title: Genome-Wide European Ancestry Study Identifies Coronary Artery Disease-Associated Loci Through Gene-Sex Hormone Interaction.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
